summary: Replayed ADR 0310 from the refreshed exact-main candidate on source commit `4125edb25791a0e025dfc13976fe847282231712`, cut repository version `0.177.144` on top of platform version `0.130.90`, converged the interactive ops portal on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and re-verified the first-run activation checklist, progressive capability reveal, and server-side launcher, runbook, and service-action guardrails on `https://ops.example.com` before promoting the platform lineage to `0.130.91`.

verification.observed: `scripts/release_manager.py --status-json` confirmed the settled exact-main branch was releasable on top of repository version `0.177.143`, `--dry-run` found the single ADR 0310 unreleased note and the platform-impact bump to `0.130.91`, and the `--bump patch --released-on 2026-04-02` run prepared repository version `0.177.144`. The preserved `release-manager-r11.txt` transcript shows the first correction-loop failure while `workstreams.yaml` still pointed at absolute worktree paths, and `release-manager-r12.txt` truthfully records that the release surfaces had already been cut by the time the repaired generator reran.

`python3 -m py_compile` passed for the focused portal-adjacent Python surfaces, and the targeted pytest slice returned `53 passed in 5.01s` across `tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py`, `tests/test_ops_portal_playbook.py`, `tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py`, `tests/test_command_palette_search.py`, and `tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py` from the exact-main `0.177.144` tree.

The first exact-main replay attempt failed closed in `2026-04-02-ws-0310-mainline-live-apply-r12.txt` because canonical truth detected a stale `README.md` after the release cut. Running `scripts/canonical_truth.py --write` repaired the generated truth surface, and the later rerun completed successfully.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=ops_portal env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true -e ops_portal_repo_root=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0310-live-apply'` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=192 changed=17 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36`, refreshed the runtime SBOM receipt, and triggered the follow-on restic backup captured in `receipts/restic-backups/20260402T124641Z.json`.

A final guarded journey through the repo-managed Proxmox jump path showed `HOST=docker-runtime-lv3`, `HEALTH={"status":"ok"}`, `PASS activation_partial_locked`, `PASS launcher_partial_locked`, `PASS locked_launcher_redirect /#activation`, `PASS overview_partial_locked`, `PASS locked_deploy_action`, `PASS complete_required_items`, `PASS activation_partial_unlocked`, `PASS unlocked_launcher_redirect https://sso.example.com`, `PASS activation_override`, `PASS launcher_partial_override`, `PASS override_launcher_redirect https://sso.example.com`, and `RESULT PASS`.

The final integrated tree passed `scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, `scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, `scripts/generate_platform_vars.py --write`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make check-build-server`, `make pre-push-gate`, and `git diff --check`. The correction loop is intentionally preserved: `workstream-surfaces-r1` failed until ws-0310 declared `Makefile`, `playbooks/ops-portal.yml`, `collections/.../tasks/main.yml`, and `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml`; `validate-r1` failed on stale generated platform vars; `validate-data-models-r1`, `live-apply-receipts-validate-r1`, and `validate-r2` failed until the receipt's future evidence references existed; `remote-validate-r1` and `remote-validate-r2` fell back locally after the build server filled `/home/ops/builds`; `remote-build-server-cleanup-r1` documents the manual removal of two stale April 1 remote session workspaces; `remote-validate-r3` then passed on the intended build-server path; and `pre-push-gate-r2` is the authoritative remote pass after that cleanup.

notes: This exact-main receipt supersedes `2026-04-02-adr-0313-contextual-help-mainline-live-apply` as the latest canonical `ops_portal` proof because ADR 0310 re-verified the interactive portal surface later on 2026-04-02.

The evidence directory intentionally preserves earlier correction-loop transcripts, including the absolute-path generator failure and the stale-canonical-truth preflight block, so another agent can audit how the final exact-main replay was repaired.

Completing the intended remote validation path required one documented manual infrastructure repair outside the repo tree: two stale April 1 build-server session workspaces were removed from `/home/ops/builds/platform_server/.lv3-session-workspaces` with `sudo rm -rf` after the build server hit `100%` disk usage and blocked immutable snapshot uploads.

correction_loop.surface: exact-main release cut, canonical-truth gating, and interactive ops portal replay
correction_loop.repair_action: Updated the ws-0310 workstream metadata to use repository-relative paths, accepted the already-cut `0.177.144` release surfaces after the first repaired generator rerun reported no remaining unreleased notes, regenerated canonical truth when the first replay failed closed on stale `README.md`, expanded the ws-0310 ownership manifest to cover the real live-apply automation footprint, refreshed `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` after the platform-version bump, created then replaced the receipt's future evidence placeholders as the validation bundle completed, reran the governed `ops_portal` live apply plus the guest-local journey, and manually removed two stale April 1 build-server session workspaces with `sudo rm -rf` after immutable snapshot uploads started failing on a full `/home/ops/builds` volume.
correction_loop.verification: The refreshed exact-main replay passed, the live guest journey stayed locked until the activation checklist was satisfied or explicitly overridden, the canonical release and platform truth surfaces converged on repo version `0.177.144` and platform version `0.130.91`, `remote-validate-r3` and `pre-push-gate-r2` both completed on the repaired build-server path, and the final repo automation bundle completed successfully on the repaired tree.
